text: Welcome aboard, @helper_alex! You're now a moderator. Please review the mod handbook and introduce yourself in #team-mods.
Hi @newbie_kim, welcome to the community! You're all set as a member—take a look at the starter guide and feel free to ask questions in #help.
Welcome, @guide_sam! You've been approved as an event helper. Check the events calendar and say hi in #event-team.
Fantastic to have you, @mentor_lina! You're approved as a mentor. Please read the mentor guidelines and drop an intro in #mentors-lounge.
